name: sonar-onboard
description: Scaffold a repo for Sonar compliance — supports both SonarQube server (self-hosted) and SonarCloud (SaaS); user picks at setup. Generates `sonar-project.properties` with language-correct paths, a CI workflow that runs the scanner on push and PR and fails on quality-gate failure, and a README snippet documenting the gate. One-shot setup. Use when the user says 'set up Sonar', 'add SonarQube to this repo', 'wire up SonarCloud', or 'set up the quality gate'.
